title: polygala supina
intro: Polygala supina, also known as smooth milkwort, is a perennial plant species in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Polygala supina include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to apply directly to affected areas.
